entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: V's company that should prioritize building persistent, objective talent profiles

entities.name: Pure Talent profile
entities.context: Honest, universally applicable candidate profile created through independent data collection

entities.name: observer effect
entities.context: Social science principle stating individuals modify behavior when they know they are being studied

entities.name: application incentive
entities.context: Distorting force in hiring where candidates optimize for specific job requirements, obscuring their true profile

relationships.context: Application incentive is a hiring-specific manifestation of the observer effect
Careerspan should prioritize building persistent Pure Talent profiles as long-term predictive assets
Pure Talent profiles minimize distortion by removing the application incentive's influence
